use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and sidebars
Show user avatars alongside comments, reviews, or mentions
Represent users in messaging interfaces and chat applications
Display profile pictures in user lists, cards, or tables
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to text initials when images fail to load. Uses circular rounded styling with consistent sizing, making it suitable for user identification across navigation, comments, lists, and messaging interfaces in any application requiring user representation.
